steps.title: Square the scale factor
steps.content:
The side lengths of PQRS are $5$ times the corresponding side lengths of JKLM. For similar figures, areas scale by the square of the side-length scale factor.
$$5^2=25$$

steps.title: Scale the area
steps.content:
Multiply the area of JKLM by the area scale factor.
$$80\cdot25=2{,}000$$
The area of PQRS is $2{,}000$ square units. The answer is D.
